narrative: Middle East hostilities drive a geopolitical risk premium as crude surges toward $75 — USD/JPY firms to 162.44 on a +275bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage, though a strong -1.58 options put skew (25d RR) signals rising downside hedging; gold lower -2.67% near $4,004; equities -0.68%; DXY +0.29%; VIX 16.8. CAD outperforms G10 peers as Governor Macklem's MPR press conference looms; USD/CAD holds 1.4151. Watch BoC Rate Decision and MPR at 14:00 UTC Wednesday.
